name: edge-plugins
description: Project-local Codex plugin scaffold for the Edge research platform. No external MCP servers or app entries are configured in this snapshot.

interface.shortDescription: Repo workflows for Edge research and runtime work.
interface.longDescription: Project-local plugin scaffold for Edge, focused on event detectors, specs, research pipelines, and verification workflows. This snapshot packages local skills and scripts only; external MCP servers and app registrations remain intentionally unconfigured.
defaultPrompt: Trace detector changes to the owning Edge specs.
Summarize the next high-value Edge verification checks.
Audit a pipeline stage against its artifact contracts.
